channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI killed our dev tool sales until we fixed this
item.description: Turn AI skepticism into sales: how a Nigerian dev tool went from $2.8k to $6.3k MRR by selling compliance artifacts, not CLIs. SARIF, offline-first retries, and the real buyer in 2026.

item.title: Islands beat SPAs in 2026
item.description: Cut web vitals 58% by switching to Astro 4.8 islands in 2026 — payloads down 90%, TTI from 5.8 s to 1.2 s, infra bill unchanged.

item.title: Service mesh is a tax you can skip
item.description: Cut 22% cloud costs and 60% incident time by ditching service mesh in production — real Istio, Cilium, and Linkerd benchmarks from 2026 systems with code and costs.

item.title: AI changed my workflow. 3 old rules I dropped
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with Redis caching — connection pooling, eviction policies, and the cache stampede mistake most teams make.

item.title: Stop async Python from burning your production
item.description: Async Python in 2026: 33% lower cost per million requests with asyncio than threads — but only if you fix these 3 timeout traps and connection leaks.

item.title: API abuse 2026: 5 attacks we missed until costs spiked
item.description: Cut API abuse costs 42% with tiered defenses: Redis 7.2 sliding windows, JWT kid swap blocking, and GraphQL depth limits — real numbers from a 2026 production system.

item.title: Ask for 20% more in 2026
item.description: Get 10-15% more salary in 2026 — AI code tools cut routine work, benchmark the overhead, and counter with hard numbers from your repo

item.title: AI scanners miss real flaws — here’s how to use them
item.description: Cut AI scanner noise 42% by pairing deterministic and AI tools — real benchmarks, false positive rates, and a 30-minute fix for your semgrep.yml file in 2026.

item.title: Nairobi SaaS stack 2026: real costs exposed
item.description: Cut Nairobi SaaS costs 42% with a concrete bill of materials — Fly Machines, Crunchy Bridge, Redis 7.2, and Backblaze B2 with real latency and spend numbers for 2026.

item.title: AI interviews need real logs: the 401 you never
item.description: Cut interview callbacks 40% by adding OpenTelemetry SDK 1.26 and Redis 7.2 — the logging, tracing, and rate-limiting setup AI screeners now demand before they review your code.

item.title: Agent memory vanishes: why your AI forgets at 3 AM
item.description: Fix AI agents that forget users overnight — Redis TTL, token budgeting, and the 3 AM cold start mistake most teams miss. Learn how to scope memory to the user and avoid silent context loss.

item.title: AI pair coding: who owns the diff now?
item.description: Cut PR review time 77% using AI pair coding — but only after we encoded invariants as human-owned tests. Token costs, pitfalls, and the guardrails that worked in 2026.

item.title: AI observability: the 3 things logs miss
item.description: AI observability cuts support tickets 80% by tracking prompt drift, semantic fidelity, and data lineage — not just latency and errors. Learn the 3 missing signals and how to instrument them with concrete code and real production numbers from a 2026 system.

item.title: One payment stack for Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana
item.description: Reduce payment failure rates 60% with one abstraction layer instead of three integrations — latency benchmarks, cost savings, and the mistake that cost $2k

item.title: Schema-per-tenant cost us 170% more than RLS
item.description: Cut database costs 60% by swapping schema-per-tenant for row-level security — benchmark data, RLS policies, and the one mistake that cost us 170% more than RLS in 2026

item.title: Migrations break prod: rollback is the real test
item.description: Zero-downtime migrations fail when rollback scripts hit 45-minute locks on 200 GB tables. Measure impact, not uptime. Use backward-compatible changes, batch backfills, and rollforward.

item.title: MCP servers crash: tool call timeout after 5s
item.description: Cut MCP server timeouts 100% by overriding the hidden 5s default — exact commands, SDK pins, and the Istio timeout trap most teams miss.

item.title: 2026 alert triage: when Opsgenie slept for you
item.description: They suppress alerts that have a 92% chance of resolving on their own, they collapse related incidents into one ticket, and they surface only the…

item.title: Year one: Claude Code’s slow-burn wins
item.description: Cut 80% of PR review time using Claude Code 1.6 in 2026 with strict type, lint, and coverage gates that actually stick.

item.title: Regulations forced better APIs: the 2026 fintech
item.description: Reduce API callback loss 99% with durable state machines — Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya fintech compliance in 2026 without over-engineering
